summary: Hand-authored the 7 transcendence commands plus shared helpers and a snapshot store schema.
reason: Generator stubs the novel commands; the offline store-backed logic (since/momentum/narrative/author-rank/time-travel/digest/evidence) and the topic_snapshots/cli_state tables that power momentum and narrative over time are hand-built.
validated_outcome: All 7 resolve as Cobra commands; momentum/narrative compute deltas vs a prior snapshot; full live dogfood 101/101.
